reactivate-account-info: You can reactivate your account to continue logging in. Your profile and posts will be visible to other users.
other-accounts-login-info: Or, log into one of your other accounts.
appeal-submitted-message: Your appeal has been submitted. If your appeal succeeds, you will receive an email.
violation-notification: Your account was found to be in violation of the <0>Bluesky Social Terms of Service</0> . You have been sent an email outlining the specific violation and suspension period, if applicable. You can appeal this decision if you believe it was made in error.
account-activation-notice: There's been a rush of new users to Bluesky! We'll activate your account as soon as we can.
estimated-time-until-ready: We estimate {{estimatedTime}} until your account is ready.
notification-when-ready: We will let you know when your account is ready.
